diagrams.title: 0/1 Knapsack DP Table Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how DP table is organized with items as rows and capacity as columns
elements: Cell (i,w): Maximum value using first i items with capacity w
Arrows showing recurrence: from top (exclude) or from left-up (include)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize table filling process and understand recurrence relation

diagrams.title: 1D Array Space Optimization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how single row is updated from right to left
elements: Array indices 0 to W representing capacities
Color coding: old values (from previous item) vs new values (with current item)
diagrams.purpose: Understand space optimization technique and iteration direction importance

diagrams.title: Recursion Tree without Memoization
diagrams.description: Shows exponential number of subproblems being recomputed
elements: Branches: include item or exclude item
Repeated subproblems shown in same color
diagrams.purpose: Visualize need for memoization and understand overlapping subproblems concept
